tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def in-progress (linear_issues {:state "in_progress"}))
(def by-assignee (group-by :assignee in-progress))
(defn count-issues [assignee] (count (get by-assignee assignee)))
(def assignees (keys by-assignee))
(def counts (map (fn [a] {:assignee a :count (count-issues a)}) assignees))
(apply max-key :count counts)"}
